title: navarretia fossalis
intro: Navarretia fossalis, also known as Navarretia, is a species of flowering plant in the phlox family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Navarretia fossalis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Navarretia fossalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
